item.title: My thighs look like cottage cheese, so here's a dump instead
item.description:
So cute
Can't name the song so improvised
Nosotros invitamos a cualquiera que tenga orgullo en nuestra cultura
Cute
Please, you've been gone so long.
LMAO
You know what I'm sayin
Have a day Have some more http://imgur.com/gallery/5RbEqE5 http://imgur.com/gallery/R4XfUed http://imgur.com/gallery/HDa9y3y http://imgur.com/gallery/KHBuDRq http://imgur.com/gallery/qWiNRSu http://imgur.com/gallery/NmRrPWO

item.title: I have too many memes (vol. 37) - a daily dump
item.description: Volume 37 of basically free* memes! Whenever you're feeling down, just remember that the 1996 film Escape from L.A. starring Kurt Russell not only exists, but everyone involved thought it was a good idea.

item.title: I don’t eat fucking crayons… I prefer colored pencils.
item.description: Not sure what mission she’s on but I’ve never been this decked out. The bottom is me actually protecting a gate. My ammo pouch is attached with gator clips if that tells you anything. Also I am a man for the people who think I’m a bad ass woman. I’m not offended. Bad ass women are bad ass.
item.dc:creator: haroldhaljordan

item.title: Dr. King was a huge advocate for worker rights.

item.title: Ancient Seas
item.description:
1..... Spinosaur friends (sound)
2..... Sweet Dreams Spinosaur Family https://www.reddit.com/r/Naturewasmetal/comments/kuuslt/sleeping_spinosaurs/
3..... At the beach https://www.reddit.com/r/Naturewasmetal/comments/kbzsbs/hello_heres_a_flying_animation/
4..... Sea citizens https://youtu.be/SLLDDBhrNOM
5..... Plesiosaur Family https://youtu.be/b80H0GS3sbQ (same species as Nessie from the Loch Ness) All these videos created by Julian Johnson-Mortimer: https://www.youtube.com/user/johnsonmortimer?app=desktop
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Tell us how you really feel Mitch.

item.title: Calmer than a monk on morphine...
item.dc:creator: DidgeryDrew

item.title: Cake Day Dump: it's Memes you guys
item.description: Sorry for selfie but this is my mom and me from maybe 15 years ago. She died 3 years ago and we miss her everyday but I wanted to share her very sweet smile with you! We are both very smiley, sweet, goofy people so I'm glad I got that from her. Hope you have a good day and thanks for the meme-ories. I'll see myself out.
item.dc:creator: kittykaroshi

item.title: If you upvote this you will upvote anything
item.dc:creator: jonjohnjonjohn

item.title: Crochet Art Crawl!
item.description:
My girlfriend and I have been getting into Crocheting recently. This is a top I made her.
this was it while I was still making it
She made this non binary flag beanie for a friend of ours. My favorite hat so far.
A hat a designed and made for my dad for hunting
A few more styles we've made
This bag is probably my favorite project (my gf also made this) my
The first two projects I ever made Viral edit: Thanks for over 2000 internet points. Was not expecting this many people to like it! Send me crochet questions, I'm not the best but I'll try to help. I have a friend opening a store front in April that we plan to stock with some of our projects so maybe I'll post updates.
item.dc:creator: ProbablySmellLikeDoge

item.title: Anonymous confession.
item.description: A Twitter account that lets people post anonymous confessions.

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Abort Mission
item.description: I’m 29, and this is my first pregnancy/abortion. My partner is very supportive and this is the right choice for us (we’re service industry and due to covid are barely scraping by right now). I’m so so so scared and nervous and worried. I’m very anxious in general, especially around medical things, and this is terrifying to me. Please send cute things and encouragement. Or don’t. I just needed to get this out. #scared
item.dc:creator: throwthisfarfaraway92

item.title: I made A LOT of Pokemon
item.description: I also make everything freehand without a pattern or guide. This is a solid two months of work here. Edit: If you guys want to see more of what I make, you can follow me here (I try to post semi-regularly) or follow me on Instagram where I tend to post more: https://www.instagram.com/loop.tee.loops/
item.dc:creator: jillianjiggs

item.title: Day 237: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Switchback Burger 5oz Montana Beef Patty, Red Onion Marmalade, Fresh Arugula, Smoked Blue Cheese, And House Made Bun From Backcountry Burger Bar In Bozeman, MT Previous Day 236: https://imgur.com/gallery/mNwMIAD MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
